content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
NEUTRAL regime — normal volatility (Vol: 27.9%) with narrow participation (Breadth: 2/8). Market tone: risk selective, momentum concentrated in Energy & Chemicals and pockets of Heavy Industry.

2. Which sectors are leading?
Energy & Chemicals led on the week with clear winners: PETKM (1W: +13.96% | 1M: +6.08%) ABOVE TREND and TUPRS (1W: +6.80% | 1M: +20.54%) ABOVE TREND. Heavy Industry shows mixed leadership: ASELS (1W: +3.87% | 1M: +18.62%) ABOVE TREND while others are uneven.

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Banking & Finance is the weakest on a 1W basis: HALKB (1W: -15.29% | 1M: -19.04%) BELOW TREND and VAKBN (1W: -8.67% | 1M: -20.92%) BELOW TREND. Broad participation is poor in Retail, Construction and Transportation, all trading BELOW TREND across leaders.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
PETKM (1W: +13.96% | 1M: +6.08%) ABOVE TREND, SASA (1W: +9.55% | 1M: -8.71%) RECOVERY, TUPRS (1W: +6.80% | 1M: +20.54%) ABOVE TREND, ENKAI (1W: +6.06% | 1M: -3.80%) RECOVERY, SISE (1W: +4.48% | 1M: -8.75%) RECOVERY. These are the week's clear outperformers and where momentum is concentrated.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
HALKB (1W: -15.29% | 1M: -19.04%) BELOW TREND, VAKBN (1W: -8.67% | 1M: -20.92%) BELOW TREND, TRALT (1W: -8.18% | 1M: -9.03%) BELOW TREND, SOKM (1W: -6.65% | 1M: -22.08%) BELOW TREND, TRMET (1W: -5.84% | 1M: -1.73%) BELOW TREND. Avoid catch-up longs in beaten-up names without fresh catalysts.

6. Momentum Stocks?
Highest 1W movers: PETKM (1W: +13.96% | 1M: +6.08%) ABOVE TREND, SASA (1W: +9.55% | 1M: -8.71%) RECOVERY, TUPRS (1W: +6.80% | 1M: +20.54%) ABOVE TREND, ENKAI (1W: +6.06% | 1M: -3.80%) RECOVERY, SISE (1W: +4.48% | 1M: -8.75%) RECOVERY. Trade momentum with tight risk management; look for 1M confirmation.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Banks are under pressure and broadly BELOW TREND: AKBNK (1W: -2.39% | 1M: -14.85%) BELOW TREND, GARAN (1W: -2.51% | 1M: -14.75%) BELOW TREND, ISCTR (1W: -2.88% | 1M: -19.11%) BELOW TREND, YKBNK (1W: -3.28% | 1M: -14.97%) BELOW TREND, HALKB (1W: -15.29% | 1M: -19.04%) BELOW TREND, VAKBN (1W: -8.67% | 1M: -20.92%) BELOW TREND, TSKB (1W: +1.31% | 1M: -12.82%) RECOVERY. Credit sensitivity and macro headlines remain key downside drivers.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Heavy Industry mixed: ASELS (1W: +3.87% | 1M: +18.62%) ABOVE TREND, VESTL (1W: +2.70% | 1M: -12.81%) RECOVERY, EREGL (1W: -2.35% | 1M: -2.82%) BELOW TREND, FROTO (1W: -2.04% | 1M: -14.45%) BELOW TREND, TOASO (1W: +1.31% | 1M: -7.98%) RECOVERY. Favor names with improving 1M confirmation (ASELS).

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Energy & Chemicals is the clearest sector opportunity: TUPRS (1W: +6.80% | 1M: +20.54%) ABOVE TREND, PETKM (1W: +13.96% | 1M: +6.08%) ABOVE TREND, SASA (1W: +9.55% | 1M: -8.71%) RECOVERY, SISE (1W: +4.48% | 1M: -8.75%) RECOVERY, TRALT (1W: -8.18% | 1M: -9.03%) BELOW TREND. Concentrated upside but watch stock-specific catalysts and commodity moves.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Neutral stance with selective overweight to Energy & Chemicals and high-quality Heavy Industry names that show 1W+1M confirmation (TUPRS, PETKM, ASELS). Underweight Banking and beaten Retail names; keep position sizes small on RECOVERY names and use tight stops.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
PETKM (1W: +13.96% | 1M: +6.08%) ABOVE TREND, TUPRS (1W: +6.80% | 1M: +20.54%) ABOVE TREND, ASELS (1W: +3.87% | 1M: +18.62%) ABOVE TREND, HALKB (1W: -15.29% | 1M: -19.04%) BELOW TREND for stress testing, SASA (1W: +9.55% | 1M: -8.71%) RECOVERY. Watch earnings, oil action and local macro news as triggers.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Energy & Chemicals for continuation or profit-taking, Banking for spillover risk and potential capitulation, Heavy Industry for selective rebounds. Market breadth and foreign flow data will determine rotation.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Monitor XU100 reaction to short-term support and the 50-day/200-day moving average crossovers as regime validators; deteriorating breadth or a >3% slide in XU100 would shift bias more negative. Key catalysts: Turkish macro prints (inflation, CB statements), oil and commodity moves, Tupras/PETKM company news and quarterly flows.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
NEUTRAL market: normal volatility with very narrow breadth — winners concentrated in Energy & Chemicals and selected Heavy Industry names. Trade selectively: overweight confirmed ABOVE TREND stocks (TUPRS, PETKM, ASELS), underweight banks and laggards; watch macro/corporate catalysts for rotation or a broader sell-off.
